case_title: ALLEN S LIU VS. BRIAN CAULEY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CAULEY, BRIAN ASSISTANT CHIEF OF CLAIMS, SF COUNTY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $685.00 FILED BY LIU, ALLEN S AS TO DEFENDANT CAULEY, BRIAN ASSISTANT CHIEF OF CLAIMS, SF COUNTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-18-2021 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ALLEN S. LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIAN CAULEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICES AND ALLOWS THE COURT TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2021 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, ALLEN S AS TO DEFENDANT CAULEY, BRIAN ASSISTANT CHIEF OF CLAIMS, SF COUNTY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, ALLEN S IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CAULEY, BRIAN ASSISTANT CHIEF OF CLAIMS, SF COUNTY DEFENDANT AGREED TO AMEND COMPLAINT (FROM BRIAN CAULEY) TO PROPERLY IDENTIFY DEFENDANT TO "THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO". CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
